notes: Solid snake implementation with gradient body, rounded rects, audio, speed scaling, and win condition; minor issue with duplicate `title` function declaration (second overwrites first, losing Space-to-pause hint) and a subtle self-collision edge-case workaround that could misfire, but overall plays well.

An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with excellent edge-case handling (like tail-chasing and dt clamping), though input buffering is limited to a single move and the snake's eye rendering is slightly rudimentary.

Core snake gameplay works with food, growth, collision, pause and restart, but there are minor polish/code issues like duplicated title() definitions, inconsistent pause prompts, and only rudimentary head visuals preventing a higher score.
